scale: 0-100 vs ERPNext breadth/depth (clean-room; no ERPNext code studied or copied)
note: Parity is intentionally NOT the goal of this product; this score is kept honest and low rather than inflated.
result: NOT ERPNext-grade. ~45% of ERPNext breadth/depth (up from 39%), by honest self-assessment. Below the 55% sprint stretch target — manufacturing + reports rose materially, but HR/payroll/POS/e-commerce and the customization framework remain shallow.
